# Extract Verbose Test Fixture

%% *Last Modified: 05/01/26 22:19:43* %%

Stable fixture used by `test/integration/extract-verbose.test.ts` for `extract header` assertions. Do NOT remove without updating that test.

## Context

%% *Last Modified: 05/01/26 22:19:43* %%

This section exists so `jact extract header <file> "Context"` returns a non-empty body for `extract-verbose.test.ts`. The body content here is intentionally minimal but must contain at least one paragraph.

This is a paragraph inside Context to ensure the extracted body is non-empty.
